---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---


```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
     HERO — Unified for both pillars
============================================================ -->
<section class="hero-section content-section">
  <h1 class="hero-title">
        Expert support &<br> <em>Elegant websites</em> <br> for Academicians
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    Specialized remote support and modern web development for <strong>University faculty</strong>
    and <strong>Researchers</strong>—tuned to the actual rhythm of academic life. Less overhead,
    fewer clunky templates, and more of the deep work that moves your field forward.
  </p>

</section>


<!-- ============================================================
     STATS BAR
============================================================ -->
<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">2.5+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Years in Remote Services</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">50+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Projects Completed</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">100%</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Remote &amp; Async</div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ============================================================
     TRUST BANNER
============================================================ -->
<div class="trust-banner">
  <h3 class="trust-eyebrow">Trusted by researchers and faculty at</h3>
  
  <div class="trust-logo-strip">
    <div class="trust-logos-inner">
      <img src="/images/tamu-logo.png" alt="Texas A&M University" class="trust-logo_1">
      <img src="/images/bits-logo.webp" alt="BITS-Pilani Hyderabad" class="trust-logo">
      <img src="/images/iit-logo.png" alt="IIT Dhanbad" class="trust-logo">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>



<!-- ============================================================
     TWO PILLARS — Overview
============================================================ -->
<section id="pillars" class="content-section">
  <h2 class="section-hero-title">One Platform • Two Solutions</h2>
  <p class="section-body">
    Whether you need someone to lift the everyday demands of academic life, or a modern website that puts your work front and centre — both are held to the same standard: careful work, honest communication, and the same deep-focus attention your research deserves
  </p>

  <div class="overview-grid">
  <div class="tier-card" data-num="01">
    <div class="tier-top">
      <div class="tier-icon">🧩</div>
      <div class="tier-name">Remote Assistance</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tier-body">
      <p class="tier-desc">
        Async, specialized support synchronized with the rhythm of academic life—grant cycles,
        submission windows, and competing priorities—so you can focus on high-impact work.
      </p>
      <a href="#assistance" class="tier-cta">Click Here to Know More →</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tier-card" data-num="02">
    <div class="tier-top">
      <div class="tier-icon">🌐</div>
      <div class="tier-name">Web Development</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tier-body">
      <p class="tier-desc">
        Modern, frictionless websites that replace clunky templates—engineered with precision
        and backed by clean, maintainable code.
      </p>
      <a href="#webdev" class="tier-cta">Explore Web Dev →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>



<!-- ============================================================
      REMOTE ASSISTANCE
============================================================ -->

<section id="assistance" class="content-section">
  <h2 class="section-title">Services Built for Academicians</h2>
  <p class="section-body">
    From looming grant cycles to tight submission windows, I help you navigate competing priorities
    so you can focus on the work that matters.
  </p>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</section>

<div class="grid service-grid">

  <div class="service-col">
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-card-top">
          <div class="service-card-header">
            <div class="service-icon-wrap">📄</div>
            <h3>Documentation &amp; Formatting</h3>
          </div>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card-bottom">
          <p>Meticulous precision across every document type—from complex manuscript formatting and grant proposals to structured journal rebuttals and technical reports. Every project is refined to meet your exact style guidelines, guaranteed.</p>
          <div class="service-tags-container">
            <span class="service-tag">LaTeX</span>
            <span class="service-tag">MS-Office</span>
            <span class="service-tag">Google Workspace with AI</span>
          </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="service-col">
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-card-top">
          <div class="service-card-header">
            <div class="service-icon-wrap-1">💻</div>
            <h3>Research Coding</h3>
          </div>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card-bottom">
          <p>Spend less time debugging and more time discovering. I use AI-driven workflows to script analysis pipelines and build statistical models that are clean, documented, and ready for publication.</p>
          <div class="service-tags-container">
            <span class="service-tag">Python / Quarto</span>
            <span class="service-tag">Data Pipelines</span>
            <span class="service-tag">AI-Automation</span>
          </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="service-col">
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-card-top">
          <div class="service-card-header">
            <div class="service-icon-wrap">🎨</div>
            <h3>Academic Design</h3>
          </div>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card-bottom">
          <p>Turn your raw data into clear visual stories. Whether you need the mathematical precision of LaTeX Beamer, the versatility of PowerPoint, or the creative speed of AI-driven design, I deliver high-quality figures and slides ready for your next defense.</p>
          <div class="service-tags-container">
            <span class="service-tag">Figures &amp; Charts</span>
            <span class="service-tag">Conference Slides</span>
            <span class="service-tag">Infographics</span>
          </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="service-col">
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-card-top">
          <div class="service-card-header">
            <div class="service-icon-wrap-1">⚙️</div>
            <h3>Workflow &amp; Admin</h3>
          </div>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card-bottom">
          <p>Stop managing logistics and start managing your lab. I organize your digital workspace, handle the friction of scheduling, and implement collaboration tools that keep your projects on track—giving you the headspace to focus on high-impact work.</p>
          <div class="service-tags-container">
            <span class="service-tag">Calendar Management</span>
            <span class="service-tag">Notion / Obsidian</span>
            <span class="service-tag">Lab Coordination</span>
          </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>


<section id="webdev" class="content-section">
  <div class="section-label">Web Development</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Websites That Work as Hard as You Do</h2>
  <p class="section-body">
    Stop fighting with outdated university templates and clunky WordPress themes.
    Whether you're one researcher building a personal presence, a lab recruiting its
    next cohort, or a department launching its next conference — I build modern,
    frictionless websites that put the work front and centre.
  </p>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>


  <div class="wd-showcase">
    <div class="enrollment-badge">
      <span class="blink-dot"></span> Live Websites
    </div>

    <div class="hero-carousel-container">
      <div class="hero-carousel" id="heroCarousel">

        <div class="hero-carousel-card">
          <div class="carousel-preview">
            <div class="mini-browser-bar">
              <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-image-container">
              <img src="/images/Livesite_2.png" alt="Academic portfolio site" class="carousel-screenshot">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-info">
            <div class="carousel-info-text">
              <span class="carousel-tag tag-portfolio">Portfolio</span>
              <h4>Prof. A Chakraborty</h4>
            </div>
            <a href="https://amritachakraborty-bitsh.github.io/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="carousel-live-btn">Live Site ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-carousel-card">
          <div class="carousel-preview">
            <div class="mini-browser-bar">
              <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-image-container">
              <img src="/images/Livesite_1.png" alt="Lab website" class="carousel-screenshot">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-info">
            <div class="carousel-info-text">
              <span class="carousel-tag tag-lab">Lab &amp; Research</span>
              <h4>D-cubed lab</h4>
            </div>
            <a href="https://suparnobhattacharyya.github.io/home.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="carousel-live-btn">Live Site ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-carousel-card">
          <div class="carousel-preview">
            <div class="mini-browser-bar">
              <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-image-container">
              <img src="/images/Livesite_3.png" alt="Conference website" class="carousel-screenshot">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-info">
            <div class="carousel-info-text">
              <span class="carousel-tag tag-conference">Summer School</span>
              <h4>D2MMS-2026</h4>
            </div>
            <a href="https://people.iitism.ac.in/~d2mms/index.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="carousel-live-btn">Live Site ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="carousel-controls">
        <button id="btn-prev" class="carousel-btn" aria-label="Previous"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left"></i></button>
        <div class="carousel-dots" id="carouselDots"></div>
        <button id="btn-next" class="carousel-btn" aria-label="Next"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
      const carousel = document.getElementById('heroCarousel');
      const btnPrev = document.getElementById('btn-prev');
      const btnNext = document.getElementById('btn-next');
      const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('carouselDots');
      if (!carousel) return;

      const cards = carousel.querySelectorAll('.hero-carousel-card');
      cards.forEach((_, i) => {
        const dot = document.createElement('button');
        dot.className = 'carousel-dot';
        dot.setAttribute('aria-label', `Go to project ${i + 1}`);
        dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
          carousel.scrollTo({ left: i * carousel.clientWidth, behavior: 'smooth' });
        });
        dotsWrap.appendChild(dot);
      });
      const dots = dotsWrap.querySelectorAll('.carousel-dot');

      function updateActiveDot() {
        const index = Math.round(carousel.scrollLeft / carousel.clientWidth);
        dots.forEach((dot, i) => i === index ? dot.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true') : dot.removeAttribute('aria-current'));
      }
      function scrollHero(direction) {
        carousel.scrollBy({ left: direction * carousel.clientWidth, behavior: 'smooth' });
      }
      if (btnPrev) btnPrev.addEventListener('click', () => scrollHero(-1));
      if (btnNext) btnNext.addEventListener('click', () => scrollHero(1));
      carousel.addEventListener('scroll', () => requestAnimationFrame(updateActiveDot));

      let autoScroll = setInterval(moveCarousel, 60000);
      function moveCarousel() {
        if (carousel.scrollLeft + carousel.clientWidth >= carousel.scrollWidth - 10) {
          carousel.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
        } else { scrollHero(1); }
      }
      carousel.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearInterval(autoScroll));
      carousel.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => autoScroll = setInterval(moveCarousel, 60000));
      updateActiveDot();
    });
  </script>
</section>



<section id="tiers" class="content-section">
  
  <h2 class="sub-section-title">The Website We Build </h2>
  
  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="tier-grid">

        <div class="tier-card tc-portfolio" data-num="01">
      <div class="tier-top">
        <div class="tier-icon">🧑‍💻</div>
        <div class="tier-name">Portfolio &amp; Personal Site</div>
        <div class="tier-tagline">For individual researchers &amp; developers</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tier-body">
        <p class="tier-desc">
          Your first impression online should be as sharp as your CV.
          A sleek, fast personal site that puts your publications, projects,
          and credentials front and centre.
        </p>
        <ul class="tier-features">
          <li>Publications, CV &amp; project showcase</li>
          <li>Interactive data &amp; tool integration</li>
          <li>Free hosting via GitHub Pages (zero ongoing server costs)</li>
          <li>Built with quality</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="/contact.qmd" class="tier-cta">Get Your Site →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tier-card tc-lab" data-num="02">
      <div class="tier-top">
        <div class="tier-icon">🔬</div>
        <div class="tier-name">Lab &amp; Research Group</div>
        <div class="tier-tagline">For PIs, research groups &amp; core facilities</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tier-body">
        <p class="tier-desc">
          Your lab is a team, a body of work, and a pipeline of talent you're
          trying to attract. A multi-page site showcasing your group's people,
          publications, and ongoing projects.
        </p>
        <ul class="tier-features">
          <li>Team, alumni &amp; collaborator pages</li>
          <li>"Join us" recruiting page for students &amp; postdocs</li>
          <li>Grant &amp; funding acknowledgment blocks</li>
          <li>Free hosting via GitHub Pages (zero ongoing server costs)</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="/contact.qmd" class="tier-cta">Build My Lab's Website →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tier-card tc-conference" data-num="03">
      <div class="tier-top">
        <div class="tier-icon">🎙️</div>
        <div class="tier-name">Conference &amp; Event Site</div>
        <div class="tier-tagline">For departments &amp; institutions hosting an event</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tier-body">
        <p class="tier-desc">
          A dedicated hub attendees actually use — schedule, speakers, and
          submissions in one place, so your organizing committee stops
          fielding the same emails on repeat.
        </p>
        <ul class="tier-features">
          <li>Schedule &amp; speaker agenda</li>
          <li>Abstract / paper submission portal</li>
          <li>Registration &amp; sponsor showcase</li>
          <li>Built to handle a traffic spike on launch day</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="/contact.qmd" class="tier-cta">Build My Conference Site →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>




<div class="wd-cta content-section">
  <h2>One Platform, Whichever You Need</h2>
  <p>
    Async support to lift the everyday demands of academic life, or a website built to put
    your work front and centre — I keep a small client roster so every project gets real
    attention. Tell me which one fits, and I'll tell you exactly what it takes to get there.
  </p>
  <div class="wd-cta-actions">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Let's Get Started →</a>
  </div>
</div>

```
